steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on naming, object types, lifecycle states, and ownership rules.

steps.title: Import or populate initial landscape
steps.description: Load existing application data from CMDB, spreadsheets, or previous tool.

steps.title: Assign ownership per application
steps.description: Record a responsible owner for each application.

steps.title: Set lifecycle status for all applications
steps.description: Tag each application with its current lifecycle state.

steps.title: Build and share first landscape view
steps.description: Create a landscape overview view or dashboard.

steps.title: Map applications to business capabilities
steps.description: Link each application to the capabilities it supports.

steps.title: Enrich with technical and business attributes
steps.description: Add hosting model, vendor, cost, risk rating.

steps.title: Map application integrations and dependencies
steps.description: Identify and record integration points.

steps.title: Establish data maintenance process
steps.description: Define who updates the landscape and how.

steps.title: Reference architecture import or build
steps.description: Establish a reference architecture and link applications.

steps.title: Build rationalisation analysis
steps.description: Identify redundant or consolidation-candidate applications.

steps.title: Embed landscape in governance and decisions
steps.description: Make BlueDolphin the system of record for application decisions.

steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on how strategic objects are named and structured.

steps.title: Capture company vision and strategic goals
steps.description: Translate strategic priorities into structured goal objects.

steps.title: Build or import business capability model
steps.description: Define the L1/L2 capability model.

steps.title: Link strategic goals to capabilities
steps.description: Trace each goal to the capabilities it depends on.

steps.title: Define current state baseline
steps.description: Document current state using landscape and capability mapping.

steps.title: Design target state architecture
steps.description: Model the desired future state.

steps.title: Identify and document architectural debt
steps.description: Surface technical debt and legacy risk.

steps.title: Build strategic roadmap
steps.description: Sequence initiatives with time horizons and dependencies.

steps.title: Present strategic overview to management
steps.description: Use BlueDolphin views to present roadmap.

steps.title: Establish strategy review cadence
steps.description: Define a recurring cycle to review and update goals.

steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on notation, naming conventions, and ownership rules.

steps.title: Model first process together
steps.description: Select one real process and model it end-to-end.

steps.title: Assign process ownership
steps.description: Assign a named owner to each process.

steps.title: Build out process library per domain
steps.description: Systematically model key processes per domain.

steps.title: Model as-is and to-be process variants
steps.description: Model both current and future versions.

steps.title: Use process models in impact analysis
steps.description: Trace downstream business impact.

steps.title: Identify process improvement opportunities
steps.description: Analyse the library for inefficiencies.

steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on design notation and object types.

steps.title: Select first design case
steps.description: Identify a real project for the first design.

steps.title: Model as-is and to-be architecture
steps.description: Document current and proposed solution.

steps.title: Establish solution design templates
steps.description: Create reusable templates in BlueDolphin.

steps.title: Link solution designs to landscape and roadmap
steps.description: Connect approved designs to applications.

steps.title: Retrospect on design decisions and patterns
steps.description: Review completed designs for patterns.

steps.title: Require design artefact in project intake
steps.description: Make a design mandatory for intake.

steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on project object attributes and lifecycle.

steps.title: Register active architecture projects
steps.description: Enter active architecture projects.

steps.title: Link projects to affected applications
steps.description: Record which applications each project changes.

steps.title: Track project status and architecture impact
steps.description: Maintain lifecycle states and communicate progress.

steps.title: Use portfolio for architecture investment decisions
steps.description: Analyse portfolio for investment decisions.

steps.title: Close the loop: update landscape on completion
steps.description: Update landscape on project closure.

steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on entity naming and relationship types.

steps.title: Define scope and level of abstraction
steps.description: Agree on domains and logical level modelling.

steps.title: Model first domain — entities and relationships
steps.description: Model core entities and relationships for one domain.

steps.title: Assign data ownership per entity
steps.description: Record a named owner for each entity.

steps.title: Build out logical data model per domain
steps.description: Systematically model entities for each domain.

steps.title: Map data flows between applications
steps.description: Identify how key entities flow between applications.

steps.title: Use data model in solution design
steps.description: Reference data model when designing solutions.

steps.title: Identify master data gaps and ownership conflicts
steps.description: Find entities without a clear master source.

steps.title: Convention model
steps.description: Agree on object types and lifecycle states for technology.

steps.title: Inventory platforms and infrastructure
steps.description: Register platforms, runtimes, and infrastructure.

steps.title: Link technology components to applications
steps.description: Record which platform each application runs on.

steps.title: Set lifecycle status per technology component
steps.description: Tag each component with its lifecycle state.

steps.title: Define technology standards and principles
steps.description: Document approved standards and link to reference architecture.

steps.title: Map deployment patterns
steps.description: Document recurring deployment patterns.

steps.title: Use technology view in governance and project intake
steps.description: Make technology layer mandatory in reviews.

steps.title: Build technology rationalisation analysis
steps.description: Identify redundant or underutilised platforms.
